keto-tuna-salad.name: Keto Tuna Salad

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Combine water-packed tuna, oil-packed tuna, mayonnaise, celery, red onion, lime juice, mustard, salt, and pepper in a bowl. Mix well.

key-lime-martini.name: Key Lime Martini
instructions: Fill a cocktail shaker 3/4 full with ice; add vodka, lime juice, simple syrup, and half-and-half.
Cover and shake until the outside of the shaker has frosted.
Strain into a martini glass.

key-lime-pie-thumbprint-cookies.name: Key Lime Pie Thumbprint Cookies

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.75 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Place racks in upper and lower thirds of oven and preheat to 350°. Pulse 9 graham cracker sheets (about 5 oz.; 1 sleeve) in a food processor until sandy crumbs form. Add ¾ cup plus 1 Tbsp. (101 g) all-purpose flour and 1¼ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¾ tsp. Morton kosher salt; pulse to combine. Transfer to a small bowl.

Pulse ½ cup (packed; 100 g) light brown sugar and ½ cup (1 stick) unsalted butter, room temperature, in processor until creamy. Add 1 large egg and ½ tsp. vanilla extract and pulse just to combine. Add graham cracker mixture and process until dough comes together and forms a ball, about 45 seconds.

Place ¼ cup (50 g) granulated sugar in a clean small bowl. Using a #40 cookie scoop (about 2 Tbsp.), portion out dough; roll into smooth balls (dough will be sticky). Working one at a time, toss balls in granulated sugar to coat generously. Divide between 2 parchment-lined baking sheets, spacing at least 2" apart (about 7 per sheet). Working one at a time, dip the bottom of a shot glass or ⅛-cup measuring cup into remaining granulated sugar, then press down in center of balls to create a divot that can hold 2 tsp. filling, about ¼" deep (for the first cookie, press glass into it a little before dipping into sugar; it will easily adhere to glass from thereafter). Chill cookies in freezer 15 minutes.

While cookies are chilling, whisk 1 large egg yolk and ⅓ cup sweetened condensed milk in a small bowl to combine. Add 2 Tbsp. plus 1½ tsp. fresh lime juice and 4 tsp. finely grated lime zest; whisk until slightly thickened.

Remove cookies from freezer and spoon about 2 tsp. filling into each divot
(don’t overfill). Bake cookies, rotating baking sheets top to bottom and front to back
halfway through, until filling is set and cookies are firm and golden brown around the
edges, 12–14 minutes. Let cookies cool on baking sheets 5 minutes. Transfer to a wire
rack and let cool completely.

Just before serving, finely grate a little lime zest over each cookie.
Do Ahead: Cookies (without lime zest) can be baked 1 day ahead. Store airtight in a single layer at room temperature.

kokoras-barduniotikos-argiro.name: Kokoras Barduniotikos

ingredients.item: 1 kg of cream medium in nick pieces
1 kg of cream medium in nick pieces

instructions: Dry the rooster ports well with abstract paper.
Sprinkle them with some of the total oil and sprinkle with some salt and pepper, rubbing the meat with the hands to season everyone.
Heat the olive oil in a large pot and in medium to high heat and arm the rooster in doses, to take uniform color.
Remove the pieces that are browned into a vessel and keep them covered and warm.
When we are done with the rooster, sauté the onion in the same oil until it softens and blinds for about 8 minutes, stringing regularly.
Add the garlic and the paste and sauce for 1 more minute.
Add the wine, as soon as the alcohol Evaporates, return the cock to the pot.
Add the grated tomato and all the sparks and fill in hot water, half the actives.
Once built, close the vessel with its lid, lower the heat and simmer the food until the cock softens to the point where it melts already with the fork, for about an hour and a half.
In the end, break the cheese into something pieces and pour it into the pot.
Shake the vehicle from the handles to go every place in the sauce.
Turn off the stove, cover the food again and let it stand for 10 minutes, melt the sauce and remove the cheese, but keeping its shape – not melt.
Serve the rooster warm with its tied sauce and accompany it if we want it with something pasta and myzithra.

korean-style-chicken-thighs-with-gochuja.name: Korean-style Chicken Thighs With Gochujang Sauce Recipe
korean-style-chicken-thighs-with-gochuja.original_name: Receta de muslos de pollo estilo coreano con salsa gochujang

ingredients.item: 1 cdita  de jengibre  (rallado o en polvo )

instructions: Preheat the oven at 180 ° C
Do some cuts and put them in a big bowl. It incorporates honey, crushed garlic teeth, soya, ginger, sesame oil, white wine vinegar and gochujang sauce.
Mezcla muy bien el pollo con todos los ingredientes hasta que queden bien impregnados.
Put your thighs onto a plate or fountain and lead to baking for 20 minutes at 180 ° C
While the thighs are baked, add some water to the bowl where you have been tipping up the chicken to clear up the salsa's leftovers.
After 20 minutes of cooking, open the oven and pour the remaining salsa onto the plate.
Hornea for another 20 minutes but at 200º C so that the thighs will be golden.
Terminado ese tiempo, apaga el horno y sirve con tus guarniciones favoritas.
